data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Amazon uses a microservices-based architecture to enhance scalability and maintainability.
data.technical_spec: Decomposed services with REST APIs, asynchronous communication, and continuous deployment.

data.title: AWS Infrastructure
data.description: Amazon leverages its own AWS platform for infrastructure needs.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes EC2, S3, RDS, and Lambda for scalable hosting, storage, database, and serverless computing.

data.title: Global Data Centers
data.description: Amazon deploys its infrastructure across a global network of data centers.
data.technical_spec: Regional availability zones with redundancy, failover, and backup.

data.title: Caching Solutions
data.description: Utilizes caching to improve website performance and reduce latency.
data.technical_spec: Includes services like Amazon CloudFront and ElastiCache for content delivery and caching.

data.title: Service-Oriented Architecture
data.description: Promotes independence of individual systems for better agility.
data.technical_spec: Encapsulation of functions into discrete services communicating over the network.
